notes: Compares P. densiflora responses after pathogenic B. xylophilus versus non-pathogenic nematode inoculation.
Includes 0 h, 6 h, 24 h, and 120 h PWN infection time points.
Integrated early transcriptomic and metabolic response to PWN.

Raw RNA-seq is public as PRJNA1127083/SRP515438: six taxa, cambium, PWN 0/2/4 weeks, three biological replicates per time point. North American-origin P. strobus and P. rigida x P. taeda are present; recover the run-to-timepoint sample sheet before DE reanalysis.
Three post-inoculation time points for P. pinaster response to B. xylophilus.
Temporal transcriptome profiling of P. densiflora infected with PWN.
